welcome.title: WELCOME TO THE HOUSTON LEARNING CENTER
welcome.subtitle: GE VERNOVA TRAINING OPERATIONS
welcome.description: The GE Vernova Houston Learning Center is dedicated to providing high-quality training in a safe, professional, and innovative environment.

site_rules: Follow posted 10 mph speed limit on campus.
PPE must be worn at all times in lab and bay areas.
Photography is not permitted without authorization.
